title: Lucky Block Worlds
description: Lucky Block Worlds introduces disguised lucky blocks into the world, so be careful where you mine!
body:
Lucky Block World:

Lucky Block World introduces lucky blocks in a fun and non invasive way to your Minecraft world. Instead of having to craft or replace blocks in your world with generated ones, Lucky Block World tags existing blocks after generation with one of five luck tiers: very unlucky, unlucky, neutral, lucky, and very lucky. 

Compatibility:

Lucky Block World uses a non invasive method and should allow for custom mod compatibility due to the tagging occuring after world generation. It also allows for any block to be tagged that is breakable, whether it is vanilla or modded, so be careful when you decide to take that villager's crafting table.

Lucky Events:

Lucky Block World has a 5 tier system with over 140 events and growing, some are more fair than others but should allow for a semi-balanced amount of fun vs. challenge. Blocks currently have a .5% chance to receive a tag that is then given a weighted change to be lucky/unlucky, followed by neutral, followed by very lucky/very unlucky. After this the event that occurs is random from the pool of events in a tier. Events can be fully customized in the config to have higher/lower chances of every tier/event/world gen tagging. Custom events are almost working and will be 100% ready in the next update.

DISCLAIMER:

Testing was done on my own and not all situations were tested, if you find any issues regarding generation, events, compatibility, multiplayer, performance, etc. or just have ideas for future updates or would like to see a different loader/version let me know!
